introSection: Havana Spinning Adventure is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster currently located at Mondo Verde in Landgraaf, Limburg, Netherlands.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Light blue track and blue supports.

fullText:
Havana Spinning Adventure is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster currently located at Mondo Verde in Landgraaf, Limburg, Netherlands.



Light blue track and blue supports.
